title: zanthoxylum budrunga
intro: Zanthoxylum budrunga is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family, commonly found in the Western Ghats of India and is also known as Indian pepper. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. Zanthoxylum budrunga can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
